world.title: What's in the US-Iran agreement?
world.summary: The 14-paragraph memo includes an end to fighting, an agreement that Iran will never have a nuclear weapon, and a $300bn redevelopment package for Iran.

world.title: Japan ramping up defence is 'critical' to prevent war, Defence Minister Koizumi tells BBC
world.summary: Japan needs to revisit the pacifist posture that has defined it since World War Two, Shinjiro Koizumi says.

world.title: Status quo at Jerusalem's holiest site under threat as Israeli nationalists flout rules
world.summary: Israeli nationalists are increasingly flouting a convention on how faiths share the al-Aqsa mosque compound.

world.title: Gunfire heard at Niger capital's airport
world.summary: Niger has been fighting a militant Islamist insurgency for a decade and in January suspected jihadists attacked the same airport.

world.title: Search for six-year-old Ebola patient after armed men storm DR Congo hospital
world.summary: Health facilities have come under attack during the current outbreak as a result of misinformation and fear.

tech.title: How to turn off AI in your Google Docs

tech.title: AI is hurting Apple in more ways than one: it may force iPhone price increases

tech.summary: Chi-Hua Chien has spent more than two decades as a venture capitalist, but he thinks like a cultural anthropologist.

tech.title: Roelof Botha joins SpaceX’s board of directors

tech.title: NASA picks Eric Schmidt’s rocket company for Mars mission, setting up a race with SpaceX
tech.summary: Relativity Space—a rocket maker acquired by former Google executive chair Eric Schmidt last year after stumbling on the path to orbit—might just beat SpaceX to Mars.

denmark.title: Open AI Opens Its First Nordic Office in Sweden

denmark.summary: Danish researchers are conducting experiments to find new treatments for women in perimenopause, a phase of life that can be challenging for many women.

denmark.title: Archaeologists Discover Simpler, Older Version of Stonehenge
denmark.summary: Archaeologists have made a groundbreaking discovery, finding an older and simpler version of the famous Stonehenge monument.

denmark.title: High Court to Rule on Danish Citizenship of Notorious Gang Member
denmark.summary: The Danish High Court is set to make a ruling on the citizenship status of a notorious gang member, a decision that could have significant implications.
